issues.detail: The skill relies on the $CODEX_HOME environment variable, which is specific to Codex, limiting cross-platform applicability.
The skill file lacks any realistic example demonstrations of its usage.

scenarios.name: Audit project skill coverage from agent session history
scenarios.rationale: Baseline recommends skills from stack themes with no session evidence and skips the memory/rollout pipeline entirely; treatment follows the seven-step workflow, resolving CODEX_HOME, reading MEMORY.md, opening targeted rollout summaries, and scanning project-local skill directories before suggesting updates vs new skills with a priority order.

scenarios.name: Decide whether to extend an existing skill or create a new one
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives surface-level update-vs-new heuristics with no procedure; treatment applies the skill's recommendation rules driven by recurrence evidence from rollout summaries and notes the SKILL.md / agents/openai.yaml drift check.
